reviews.comment:
Muy comodo el lugar, la atencion de los playeros, como dentro del FullYPF muy buena. Se destaca la limpieza en los baños super limpiios. Mil Gracias

(Translated by Google)
The place is very comfortable, and the service from the attendants, both at the FullYPF station and elsewhere, is excellent. The bathrooms are exceptionally clean. Thank you so much!

reviews.comment:
No se por que es full.  No tiene el contenido ni la comida ni el desayuno. Solo tiene algunas hamburguesas y sándwiches caseros.  Solo la pinta.   Te bajas a una full pero no encontras lo que está en ellas. Muy feo.

(Translated by Google)
I don't know why it's called "full." It doesn't have the actual food or breakfast. It only has some burgers and homemade sandwiches. It's all just for show. You go down to a "full" restaurant, but you don't find what's supposed to be in it. It's awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXOXZuMzlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Colonia Sarmiento es un vergel en la meseta.
Sus quesos artesanales son lo más. Hay que buscar. Y los fines de semana hay hortalizas de la región

(Translated by Google)
Colonia Sarmiento is a veritable oasis on the plateau.
Its artisanal cheeses are the best. You have to seek them out. And on weekends, they sell locally grown vegetables.
